<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. -->

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Playwright project for end-to-end testing
- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created playwright.config.ts, package.json, tsconfig.json, and example tests
- [x] Customize the Project - Project structure configured with TypeScript, multi-browser support
- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions required for base Playwright setup
- [x] Compile the Project - npm install and playwright browsers installed successfully
- [x] Create and Run Task - VS Code tasks configured for test execution, UI mode, and debugging
- [x] Launch the Project - Project ready for testing
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md created
